entries.claim_text: Efficient Infinite Context Transformers with Infini-attention
entries.quoted_snippet: Efficient Infinite Context Transformers with Infini-attention

entries.claim_text: COLM 2024
entries.quoted_snippet: colm2024_conference
colm2024_conference

entries.claim_text: Tsendsuren Munkhdalai
entries.quoted_snippet: Tsendsuren Munkhdalai, Manaal Faruqui and Siddharth Gopal

entries.claim_text: paper
entries.quoted_snippet: colm2024_conference

entries.claim_text: Infini-attention 的單層結構
entries.quoted_snippet: Infini-attention has an additional compressive memory with linear attention for processing infinitely long contexts

entries.claim_text: Transformer-XL 只快取上一個 segment 的 KV
entries.quoted_snippet: Infini-Transformer (top) has an entire context history whereas Transformer-XL (bottom) discards old contexts

entries.claim_text: specialized head、貼近 0.5 者為 mixer head
entries.quoted_snippet: two types of heads emerged in Infini-attention after training

entries.claim_text: BookSum 驗證集上 Rouge overall 分數對輸入長度
entries.quoted_snippet: Infini-Transformers obtain better Rouge overall scores with more book text provided as input

entries.claim_text: 光是 KV cache 就有 3TB 的記憶體足跡
entries.quoted_snippet: 3TB memory footprint for a 500B model with batch size 512 and context length 2048

entries.claim_text: 壓縮記憶體（compressive memory），用 linear attention
entries.quoted_snippet: incorporates a compressive memory into the vanilla attention mechanism

entries.claim_text: 1M 長度的 passkey 檢索
entries.quoted_snippet: long-context language modeling, 1M length passkey context block retrieval and 500K length book summarization tasks

entries.claim_text: 同一個 attention 層不會把任何狀態帶到下一個 segment
entries.quoted_snippet: no state is carried over to the next input sequence

entries.claim_text: scaled dot-product attention：先算出 $Q, K, V$
entries.quoted_snippet: standard causal dot-product attention context within each segment

entries.claim_text: A_{dot} = \mathrm{softmax}
entries.quoted_snippet: \frac{Q K^T}{\sqrt{d_{model}}}

entries.claim_text: 直接重用** dot-product attention 已經算好的
entries.quoted_snippet: we reuse the query, key and value states

entries.claim_text: A_{mem} = \frac{\sigma(Q)
entries.quoted_snippet: \sigma({Q}) M_{s-1}

entries.claim_text: element-wise 的 ELU+1
entries.quoted_snippet: use element-wise ELU + 1 as the activation function

entries.claim_text: M_s \leftarrow M_{s-1} + \sigma(K)^\top V
entries.quoted_snippet: \sigma(K)^T V

entries.claim_text: M_s \leftarrow M_{s-1} + \sigma(K)^\top \left(V
entries.quoted_snippet: \sigma(K)^T (V - \frac{\sigma({K}) M_{s-1}}

entries.claim_text: 每個 head 只多一個訓練參數
entries.quoted_snippet: adds only a single scalar value as training parameter per head

entries.claim_text: A = \mathrm{sigmoid}(\beta) \odot A_{mem}
entries.quoted_snippet: \odot A_{mem} + (1 - \textit{sigmoid}(\beta)) \odot A_{dot}

entries.claim_text: 分數貼近 0 或 1 的「specialized head」
entries.quoted_snippet: specialized heads with a gating score near 0 or 1 and mixer heads with a score close to 0.5

entries.claim_text: 只快取「上一個 segment」的 KV
entries.quoted_snippet: Transformer-XL (bottom) discards old contexts since it caches the KV states for the last segment only

entries.claim_text: 即常數複雜度 $d_{key} \times d_{value} + d_{key}$
entries.quoted_snippet: constant memory complexity of $d_{key} \times d_{value} + d_{key}$

entries.claim_text: $d_{key}=d_{value}=128$、$H=8$ heads、$l=12$ 層
entries.quoted_snippet: 12 layers and 8 attention heads of dimension 128 each

entries.claim_text: 正好對上論文報告的壓縮記憶大小 1.6M
entries.quoted_snippet: 1.6M (114x) & None
unroll over 16 steps

entries.claim_text: perplexity 還更低
entries.quoted_snippet: Infini-Transformer outperforms memorizing transformers
Infini-Transformer\tiny{ (Linear)} & 1.6M (114x) & None & 2048 & \bf{9.65} & 2.24

entries.claim_text: Memorizing Transformers：183M (1x) 記憶、PG19 11.37、Arxiv-math 2.26
entries.quoted_snippet: Memorizing Transformers & 183M (1x) & 2048 & 2048 & 11.37 & 2.26

entries.claim_text: RMT：2.5M (73x) 記憶、PG19 13.27、Arxiv-math 2.55
優於 Transformer-XL 的 11.88 與 Memorizing Transformers 的 11.37
entries.quoted_snippet: Memorizing Transformers & 183M (1x) & 2048 & 2048 & 11.37 & 2.26

entries.claim_text: 後者是在第 9 層用長度 65K 的 KV 記憶
entries.quoted_snippet: KV memory with length of 65K at its $9^{th}$ layer

entries.claim_text: 把訓練序列長度從 32K 進一步拉到 100K 並改在 Arxiv-math 上訓練，perplexity 還能再降到 Linear 的 2.21 與 Linear+Delta 的 2.20（此數字僅來自該 Arxiv-math 100K 實驗，不含 PG19）
entries.quoted_snippet: We further increased the training sequence length to 100K from 32K and trained the models on Arxiv-math dataset. 100K training further decreased the perplexity score to \textbf{2.21} and \textbf{2.20} for $Linear$ and $Linear + Delta$ models.

entries.claim_text: delta rule 帶來的差異其實非常小
在 PG19 上兩者僅差 0.02 perplexity（9.65 vs 9.67，約 0.21%），在 Arxiv-math 上則反而是 Linear + Delta 低 0.01（2.23 vs 2.24）
entries.quoted_snippet:
Infini-Transformer\tiny{ (Linear)} & 1.6M (114x) & None & 2048 & \bf{9.65} & 2.24 \\
    Infini-Transformer\tiny{ (Linear + Delta)} & 1.6M (114x) & None & 2048 & 9.67 & \bf{2.23} \\

entries.claim_text: 1B LLM 的 vanilla MHA 換成 Infini-attention
entries.quoted_snippet: replaced the vanilla MHA in a 1B LLM with Infini-attention

entries.claim_text: 每個 Infini-attention 層實際處理的 segment 長度在所有 LLM 實驗中一律固定為 $N=2\text{K}$
entries.quoted_snippet: The segment length $N$ was set to 2K throughout our experiments.

entries.claim_text: fine-tune 400 步
entries.quoted_snippet: fine-tuning on 5K length inputs for 400 steps

entries.claim_text: passkey：先用 4K 輸入 continual pre-train 30K 步、batch size 64
entries.quoted_snippet: continued to pre-train on inputs with length of 4K. The model was trained for 30K steps with batch size of 64
Infini-Transformer\tiny{ (Linear)}  & 14/13/98 & 11/14/100 & 6/3/100
Infini-Transformer\tiny{ (Linear + Delta)}  & 13/11/99 & 6/9/99

entries.claim_text: 評估時直接餵到 **500K**
entries.quoted_snippet: increase to 500K for evaluating
generation temperature of 0.5 and $top_{p} = 0.95$ and set the number of decoding steps to 1024

entries.claim_text: BookSum：8B 模型用 8K 輸入 continual pre-train 30K 步
entries.quoted_snippet: continuously pre-training a 8B LLM model with 8K input length for 30K steps

entries.claim_text: BookSum：fine-tune 時輸入長度設為 32K
entries.quoted_snippet: We set the input length to 32K for fine-tuning

entries.claim_text: 取得新的 SOTA
entries.quoted_snippet: achieves a new SOTA on BookSum
Infini-Transformers\tiny{ (Linear + Delta)} & \bf 40.0
PRIMERA + Unlimiformer &	37.9 &	8.2 &	16.3 &	17.2

entries.claim_text: 宣稱餵進越多書本文字表現越好
entries.quoted_snippet: clear trend showing that with more text provided as input from books

entries.claim_text: 相對 128K 的 19.43 峰值，256K 的 19.23 與 500K 的 19.34 分別低 0.20 與 0.09，最後三點未再超過 128K，並非單調成長（500K 比 256K 略回升 0.11）
3TB KV cache（500B 模型、batch 512、context 2048）這個引用數字具體且可核
entries.quoted_snippet: 3TB memory footprint for a 500B model with batch size 512 and context length 2048

entries.claim_text: 都不是現代長上下文 LLM
entries.quoted_snippet: all our models have 12 layers and 8 attention heads

entries.claim_text: 拿一個 8B 的 decoder LLM 去比 BART、PRIMERA 這類專為摘要打造的 encoder-decoder 模型
entries.quoted_snippet: compares our model against the encoder-decoder models that were built particularly for the summarization task

entries.claim_text: 後者的數字是直接引用自 Unlimiformer 論文
entries.quoted_snippet: The BART, PRIMERA and Unlimiformer results are from \citet{bertsch2024unlimiformer}.

entries.claim_text: 干擾文字是同一段「The grass is green…」重複 x 次堆出來的低熵內容
entries.quoted_snippet: The grass is green. The sky is blue. The sun is yellow.

entries.claim_text: delta rule 的效果隨任務而異：語言建模 perplexity 幾乎無差（9.65 vs 9.67），但 1M passkey fine-tune 後 Linear+Delta 100/100/100 略勝 Linear 96/94/100，BookSum Overall Rouge 18.5 對 18.0
entries.quoted_snippet:
Infini-Transformers\tiny{ (Linear)} & 37.9 &	8.7 &	17.6 &	18.0 \\
    Infini-Transformers\tiny{ (Linear + Delta)} & \bf 40.0 & \bf	8.8 & \bf	17.9 &	\bf 18.5

entries.claim_text: 把整段歷史壓進一個 $d_{key} \times d_{value}$ 的固定矩陣，數學上必然是有損的
12 層、8 head（每 head 維度 128、每層 FFN hidden layer 4096）的從頭訓練小模型
entries.quoted_snippet: all our models have 12 layers and 8 attention heads of dimension 128 each and FFNs with hidden layer 4096
